description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI: sanitizer tests that runs on push to master and main branches, on pull request open and synchronize, on merge group checks requested, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow checks for changed files, then runs tests with address and memory sanitizers on an ubuntu-24.04 environment if code changes are detected or if dispatched. It uses reusable find changes workflow, checks out code, sets up Bazel with caching, installs Python 3.12 with pip caching, installs qsim dependencies, and runs C++ tests with sanitizers.
